creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
tabthorpe    2010-03-10 21:18:44 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    print                Makefile 
  Added files:
    print/utopia         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This port provides the PostScript Type 1 version of Adobe Utopia for use
  with GNU Troff, as it is configured in a FreeBSD basic install.
  
  For details on usage, invoke:  man utopia_font.
  
  WWW: http://www.mammothcheese.ca/munger.html
  
  --
  James Bailie <jimmy@mammothcheese.ca>
  http://www.mammothcheese.ca
  
  PR:             ports/144334
  Submitted by:   James Bailie <jimmy at mammothcheese.ca>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.485     +1 -0      ports/print/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/print/utopia/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/print/utopia/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/print/utopia/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/print/utopia/pkg-plist (new)
